---
title: "Ayrshire 002"
---

![Heifer](images/cattles/img1.jpg)

### Details

-   Breed: Ayrshire
-   Age: 12 Months
-   Pregnant: No
-   Dam: TZ010
-   Sire: TZB02
-   Price: 950,000 TZS

::: footer
### TriAnn Integrated Farm

📞 Phone: +255XXXXXXXXX\
📧 Email: triannfarm\@email.com\
📍 Morogoro, Tanzania

© 2026 TriAnn Integrated Farm
:::
